page: Microsoft Azure DC16as_v6 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCasv6 server family. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor built on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It operates under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type does not include any bundled local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached storage. It is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disks. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this instance, and there is no integrated GPU hardware.

With dedicated CPU allocation and a standard 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the DC16as_v6 offers a predictable resource profile for general-purpose workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention from other tenants. This configuration is suitable for enterprise applications, mid-sized databases utilizing network storage, web serving, and development environments that require stable compute resources without local storage dependencies.
description: Microsoft Azure DC16as_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCasv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to external high-performance storage volumes. With zero integrated GPUs and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this server is designed for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources. The balanced CPU-to-memory ratio makes it highly suitable for general-purpose enterprise applications, web servers, and application backends that rely on network-attached storage for data persistence.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC16as_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 16 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 64.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

tagline: A dedicated AMD-powered virtual machine offering a balanced memory-to-core ratio and premium storage compatibility for general-purpose workloads.
